title: Tensura: Unique Monsters
description: Tensura Unique Monsters introduces larger, stronger Unique Monsters into the world for a more versatile overall experience. Additionally it adds the Appraisal Eye skill to detect and analyze them, plus configurable spawn chances and settings.
body:
![Mod Text ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3c3654d796918c30df5ad8157c35fc4f0fed624.png) ![Unique mob overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12fb9d0f9816511b63fe08243975d16cfdfb6d8_0.webp) **Tensura Unique Monsters** is a collaboration add-on between **Slime Throne** and **TRBeyond**, designed to bring more diversity and challenge to your Tensura modpack. As you explore the world, you may encounter monsters that stand out from the rest — larger than their counterparts and significantly more powerful. **Be careful.**
### 👉 [**Join our discord HERE**](https://discord.slimethrone.net/) ### 👉 [**Join beyonds discord HERE**](https://discord.gg/aE6sE3ahnN)
![Unique mob Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0adadfeb7ba97a459670f10570f957b025cbc440_0.webp) ## Appraisal Eye To help deal with these threats, a new unique skill has been added: **Appraisal Eye**. ### Modes **Scan** • Enters a third-person scanning view • Highlights nearby **Unique Monsters** in **red** • Quickly identify dangerous threats **Remote Analysis** • Combines **Analytical Appraisal** + **Farsight** • View enemy stats from a much greater distance • **Unique Monsters** remain highlighted in **red** ## Configurable Settings Server owners can customize the system: • Chance for monsters to spawn as **Unique Monsters** • Blacklist spesific entities • Blacklist spesific dimantions • Can configure spesific entity values • Additional balance and gameplay settings
